visual_description: A man in a light blue shirt and striped tie walks through a glass-walled office space. He approaches a long table where a group of men in dark clothing stand, and an older man with gray hair sits eating. The man in the tie gestures with his hand as he speaks to the group.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese, followed by a short, sharp electronic beep.
